text:
Dear,
Thank you very much.
Milmedika team

translations.sr:
Poštovani,
Hvala vam mnogo.
Milmedika tim
translations.sr_cyrl:
Поштовани,
Хвала вам много.
Milmedika тим
translations.en:
Dear,
Thank you very much.
Milmedika team
translations.de:
Sehr geehrte/r,
Vielen herzlichen Dank.
Milmedika-Team
translations.tr:
Sayın,
Çok teşekkür ederiz.
Milmedika ekibi
